description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Cross-Platform CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job that runs on macos-latest, windows-latest, and ubuntu-latest, checking out the repository, configuring with cmake --preset examples, building with cmake --build --preset examples, and running tests with cmake --build --preset examples --target rsa-create-run and rsa-verify-run. Additionally, on push events, use a custom badge action with category cross-platform and label set to the current OS.
